site.name: Verticore Engineering Pvt Ltd
site.title: Verticore Engineering - Elevator Manufacturing & Solutions
site.description: We design and manufacture high-quality elevators and components built for safety, performance, and lasting reliability.

services.name: Passenger Elevators
services.description: Modern, whisper-quiet passenger lift systems designed for residential towers, hotels, hospitals, and commercial high-rises.

services.name: Goods Elevators
services.description: Heavy-duty freight platforms engineered for warehouses, factories, and industrial complexes with reinforced load capacity.

services.name: Elevator Components
services.description: Cabins, doors, control panels, guide rails, and safety systems — precision-made and globally sourced.

services.name: Maintenance & Support
services.description: Installation, modernisation, and long-term service contracts to keep your vertical transport performing at peak.
